query:
-- Create test driver
INSERT INTO drivers (email, name, licenseNumber, companyId, isApproved) 
VALUES ('driver@test.com', 'Test Driver', 'DL123456789', 'comp1', 1);

-- Create test vehicle
INSERT INTO vehicles (id, licensePlate, model, capacity, companyId) 
VALUES ('v1', 'ABC-1234', 'Mercedes Sprinter', 12, 'comp1');

-- Create test assignment
INSERT INTO assignments (id, driverId, routeId, routeName, vehicleId, status, scheduledDeparture, scheduledArrival, passengerCount) 
VALUES ('a1', 'driver1', 'r1', 'Downtown Route A', 'v1', 'assigned', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOURS), 8);

-- Create test manifest
INSERT INTO manifests (id, assignmentId, passengerName, reservedSeat) 
VALUES ('m1', 'a1', 'John Smith', '1A');

-- Create test driver notes
INSERT INTO driverNotes (id, assignmentId, notes, specialInstructions) 
VALUES ('dn1', 'a1', 'Route A - Standard pickup and dropoff', 'Please arrive 10 minutes early for passenger check-in.');

-- Verify data
SELECT 'Drivers' as table_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM drivers
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Vehicles', COUNT(*) FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Assignments', COUNT(*) FROM assignments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Manifests', COUNT(*) FROM manifests
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Driver Notes', COUNT(*) FROM driverNotes;
